●4+: Cannot be destroyed by battle, also you take no battle damage from battles involving it.
●5+: Can attack directly.
●6+: Its original ATK/DEF become 5000. 
●7+: Unaffected by the effects of other LIGHT/DARK/WIND monsters.
●8+: Unaffected by the effects of other FIRE/EARTH/WATER monsters.
●9+: Unaffected by the effects of other DIVINE monsters.
●10+: Unaffected by Spell effects.
●11+: Unaffected by Trap effects.
●12+: Cannot be used as material for a Fusion/Synchro/Xyz/Link Summon.
●13+: Cannot be Tributed.
●14+: Cannot be send to the GY, nor returned to the hand or Deck.
●15+: Once per turn: You can make your opponent's LP become 5100.
●16+: Once per turn: You can send all Spells/Traps on the field/Decks to the GY, except Field Spells; for the rest of this turn the effects of cards in the hands/GYs/banishment are negated and cannot be activated.
●17+: Once per turn: You can banish any number of cards from the Extra Decks, face-down; banish an equal number of cards from their Decks, face-down.
